ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "vehicle_name" TEXT /* Name or identifier of the vehicle */,
  "vehicle_type" TEXT /* Type of the vehicle (e.g., car, truck) */,
  "registration_number" TEXT /* Registration number of the vehicle */,
  "manufactured_date" TEXT /* Date the vehicle was manufactured */,
  "assigned_location" TEXT /* Location where the vehicle is currently assigned */,
  "current_status" TEXT /* Current status of the vehicle (e.g., active, maintenance) */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "next_maintenance_due" TEXT /* Date when the next maintenance is due */,
  "mileage" INTEGER /* Current mileage of the vehicle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the location is situated */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the location is situated */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the location is situated */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "images" (
  "image_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle that captured the image */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the image was captured */,
  "capture_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the image was captured */,
  "image_path" TEXT /* File path to the image */,
  "image_size" REAL /* Size of the image in MB */,
  "image_format" TEXT /* Format of the image (e.g., jpg, png) */,
  "vehicle_speed" REAL /* Speed of the vehicle when the image was captured */,
  "vehicle_heading" REAL /* Heading of the vehicle when the image was captured */,
  "image_quality" INTEGER /* A measure of the image quality (e.g., 1-10) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_images_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_images_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "detections" (
  "detection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each detection */,
  "image_id" TEXT /* ID of the image where the detection was made */,
  "label_id" INTEGER /* ID of the traffic sign label */,
  "confidence" REAL /* Confidence score of the detection */,
  "x_min" INTEGER /* X-coordinate of the top-left corner of the bounding box */,
  "y_min" INTEGER /* Y-coordinate of the top-left corner of the bounding box */,
  "x_max" INTEGER /* X-coordinate of the bottom-right corner of the bounding box */,
  "y_max" INTEGER /* Y-coordinate of the bottom-right corner of the bounding box */,
  "detection_time" TEXT /* Exact time when the detection was made */,
  "detection_status" TEXT /* Status of the detection (e.g., confirmed, pending, false positive) */,
  "detection_source" TEXT /* Source of the detection (e.g., ATRS, manual override) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("detection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_detections_label_id FOREIGN KEY ("label_id") REFERENCES traffic_sign_labels ("label_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_detections_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "traffic_sign_labels" (
  "label_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each label */,
  "label_name" TEXT /* Name of the traffic sign label */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the traffic sign label */,
  "sign_priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the traffic sign (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "regulatory_body" TEXT /* Regulatory body that issued the traffic sign */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("label_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_routes" (
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each route */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle assigned to the route */,
  "route_name" TEXT /* Name of the route */,
  "start_location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the starting location */,
  "end_location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ending location */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the route started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the route ended */,
  "route_distance" REAL /* Total distance of the route */,
  "route_duration" INTEGER /* Total duration of the route in minutes */,
  "route_status" TEXT /* Status of the route (e.g., planned, in progress, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("route_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_routes_end_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("end_location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_routes_start_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("start_location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_routes_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "route_images" (
  "route_image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each route-image relationship */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* ID of the route */,
  "image_id" TEXT /* ID of the image captured during the route */,
  "capture_sequence" INTEGER /* Sequence number of the image capture within the route */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("route_image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_route_images_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_route_images_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES vehicle_routes ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., operator, analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_vehicles" (
  "user_vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-vehicle relationship */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle assigned to the user */,
  "assignment_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the user was assigned to the vehicle */,
  "assignment_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the user's assignment to the vehicle ends */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_vehicles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_vehicles_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_routes" (
  "user_route_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-route relationship */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* ID of the route assigned to the user */,
  "assignment_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the user was assigned to the route */,
  "assignment_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the user's assignment to the route ends */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_route_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_routes_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES vehicle_routes ("route_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_routes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_metadata" (
  "image_id" TEXT /* ID of the image */,
  "capture_latitude" REAL /* Latitude where the image was captured */,
  "capture_longitude" REAL /* Longitude where the image was captured */,
  "capture_altitude" REAL /* Altitude where the image was captured */,
  "capture_heading" REAL /* Heading of the vehicle when the image was captured */,
  "capture_speed" REAL /* Speed of the vehicle when the image was captured */,
  "image_quality_score" REAL /* A more detailed score for image quality (e.g., 0.0-1.0) */,
  "capture_weather" TEXT /* Weather conditions when the image was captured */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_maintenance" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date when the maintenance was performed */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance (e.g., routine, repair) */,
  "service_provider" TEXT /* Name of the service provider */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance */,
  "next_service_mileage" INTEGER /* Mileage at which the next service is due */,
  "service_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments from the service provider */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_maintenance_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the log entry */,
  "log_type" TEXT /* Type of log (e.g., info, warning, error) */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Message of the log entry */,
  "log_source" TEXT /* Source of the log entry (e.g., vehicle, ATRS, user) */,
  "log_severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the log entry (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_logs_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "route_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* ID of the route */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the log entry */,
  "log_type" TEXT /* Type of log (e.g., info, warning, error) */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Message of the log entry */,
  "log_source" TEXT /* Source of the log entry (e.g., vehicle, ATRS, user) */,
  "log_severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the log entry (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_route_logs_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES vehicle_routes ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the log entry */,
  "log_type" TEXT /* Type of log (e.g., info, warning, error) */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Message of the log entry */,
  "log_source" TEXT /* Source of the log entry (e.g., vehicle, ATRS, user) */,
  "log_severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the log entry (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "detection_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "detection_id" INTEGER /* ID of the detection */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the log entry */,
  "log_type" TEXT /* Type of log (e.g., info, warning, error) */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Message of the log entry */,
  "log_source" TEXT /* Source of the log entry (e.g., vehicle, ATRS, user) */,
  "log_severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the log entry (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_detection_logs_detection_id FOREIGN KEY ("detection_id") REFERENCES detections ("detection_id")
)
